sections.paragraph:
verb לעבות (>>לַעֲבוֹת)

to thicken, grow fat

verb הועב

be clouded, overclouded; made scowl

verb עובה

be thickened; reinforced; condensed

verb להתעבות

to get thick; condense; be reinforced

verb להעיב

to cloud, overcloud; make scowl

verb לעבות (>>עיבה)

to thicken; condense; reinforce

adjective

thick, coarse

masculine noun

cloud
